goals.title: Story 1: Selection and mapping hardening
goals.objective: Add/strengthen tests and implementation for selections spanning mark, replace, line, and widget ranges. Cover cursor positions at start/end boundaries, activationTo, after widget/range end, mixed selections around inline code delimiters, task checkboxes, code-block widgets, and callout widgets. Preserve canonical source except explicit source-backed commands.
goals.evidence: Added boundary and mixed selection coverage in tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts; pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed (7 tests).

goals.title: Story 2: Clipboard/source preservation hardening
goals.objective: Upgrade clipboard coverage from helper-only source slicing to behavior-level coverage. Attempt mounted or filter-level copy/cut behavior using CodeMirror clipboard seams; if Happy DOM blocks that, document the limitation and prove an equivalent command/filter path. Cover inline code, task checkbox, fenced code widget, callout widget, mixed selections, ordinary text passthrough, cut undo/redo where implemented, and multi-selection if practical.
goals.evidence: Added mounted copy/cut coverage in tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts for inline code, task markers, fenced-code widgets, callout widgets, mixed selections, ordinary text, multiple selections with allowMultipleSelections, and undoable delete.cut; pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts passed (50 tests).

goals.title: Story 3: Activation and atomic-range policy decision
goals.objective: Make the atomic policy explicit and test-backed. Either keep no-atomic-ranges with stronger cursor/deletion/pointer evidence or introduce private EditorView.atomicRanges for selected widget ranges with cursor motion, deletion, and pointer activation tests.
goals.evidence: Kept the explicit no-atomic-ranges policy and strengthened tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts with source inspection plus cursorCharForward/cursorCharBackward, deleteCharForward, undo, and focused reveal behavior; existing pointer activation coverage remains for code-block and callout widgets. pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-task-toggle.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts passed (50 tests).

goals.title: Story 4: Private internal block architecture refinement
goals.objective: Add a private contract checkpoint for source range, activation range, clipboard source policy, and optional atomic policy. Refine the private LivePreviewBlockRenderer path so code-block and callout widgets share match-to-widget-to-activation metadata without exporting public block APIs. Verify live-preview/index.ts, package root exports, and packages/editor/package.json do not leak private helpers.
goals.evidence: Added private block metadata contract in packages/editor/src/live-preview/block-renderers.ts and internal-types.ts; code-block/callout widgets now share livePreviewBlockWidgetMetadata in renderers.ts for sourceFrom/sourceTo, activation range, document-source clipboard policy, and no atomic policy. Strengthened tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts to assert first-party contract and package/barrel non-export. pnpm vitest run tests/editor-live-preview-block-registry.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-widgets.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-callouts.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-clipboard.test.ts tests/editor-live-preview-selection-mapping.test.ts passed (43 tests).

goals.title: Story 5: Viewport/performance regression, final cleanup, review, and commit
goals.objective: Extend large mixed-document fixtures for headings, tasks, code blocks, and callouts. Run targeted Live Preview suites, no-regex gate, lint, typecheck, full tests, ai-slop-cleaner on changed files, independent code review, architect review, final commit, and Ultragoal final checkpoint.
goals.evidence: Extended large mixed viewport fixture; completed final verification, ai-slop-cleaner pass, independent code-review APPROVE, architect CLEAR, and aggregate Codex goal completion. Verification: targeted Live Preview/no-regex suite passed (8 files/63 tests), pnpm lint passed, pnpm typecheck passed, pnpm test passed (51 files/260 tests), pnpm perf:smoke passed, pnpm knip passed, git diff --check passed.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
